  • weekly picks (Jun 1 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 1st week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score : 22854

    2606.03897v1 Parametrically induced strong coupling between a superconducting quantum circuit and a solid-state spin ensemble (arXiv)

    • Score : 20549

    2606.01716v1 Doping- and temperature-dependent electronic structure and spin dynamics in the Hubbard model on a square lattice within cluster perturbation theory (arXiv)

    • Score : 18984

    2606.02501v1 Electrical observation via spin Seebeck effect of fractionalized excitations in a magnetic insulator (arXiv)

    • Score : 18629

    2606.03082v1 Magnetic Symmetries and the Structure of Correlation Functions in Quantum Field Theory (arXiv)

    • Score : 17708

    2606.00824v1 Quantum control of spin qubits using SOT-driven nanomagnets (arXiv)

    • Score : 16135

    2606.01938v1 Magnetic control of electron scattering in silicene quantum dots (arXiv)

    Unfold/Fold

    06/06

    1. s41467-026-74177-8 Grain boundary engineered aluminum current collector for energy-dense initially anode-free sodium metal batteries (Nature Communications)

    2. s41567-026-03290-8 Superconductivity on two surfaces (Nature Physics)
